flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 39% at Westminster University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (882 vs 1.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Westminster University fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 823).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Westminster University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.2k → $43.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Westminster University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.2k → $43.5k).
